Bash(node -e "const initSqlJs = require\(''sql.js''\); initSqlJs\(\).then\(SQL => { const db = new SQL.Database\(\); db.run\(''CREATE TABLE t \(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT\)''\); db.run\(''INSERT INTO t \(name\) VALUES \(?\)'', [''test'']\); const r = db.exec\(''SELECT last_insert_rowid\(\) as id''\); console.log\(''exec result:'', JSON.stringify\(r\)\); console.log\(''rowid:'', r[0].values[0][0]\); console.log\(''type:'', typeof r[0].values[0][0]\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const initSqlJs = require\(''sql.js''\); initSqlJs\(\).then\(SQL => { const db = new SQL.Database\(\); db.run\(''CREATE TABLE t \(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT\)''\); db.run\(''INSERT INTO t \(name\) VALUES \(?\)'', [''test'']\); const r = db.exec\(''SELECT last_insert_rowid\(\) as id''\); console.log\(''result:'', JSON.stringify\(r\)\); const stmt = db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = ?''\); stmt.bind\([r[0].values[0][0]]\); console.log\(''step:'', stmt.step\(\)\); console.log\(''obj:'', JSON.stringify\(stmt.getAsObject\(\)\)\); stmt.free\(\); }\)")
